title: Success of Maha-Vistaar led Centre to launch Bharat-Vistaar: Fadnavis
description: “the success of state’s unique maha-vistaar app, an application integrating artificial intelligence (ai) with agricultural practices has prompted the union government to adopt this application at national-level through bharat-vistaar app,” said chief minister devendra fadnavis on friday at vanamati. he was speaking at the inaugural ‘ranjitbabu deshmukh gram vikas puraskar - 2026,’ organised by rd foundation to celebrate 80th birthday of ranjit deshmukh, former maharashtra minister of ruarl development.
content:
Devendra Fadnavis felicitating Ranjit Deshmukh and Roopa Deshmukh. Chandrashekhar Bawankule, Jaikumar Gore, Dr Ashish Deshmukh, Anil Deshmukh, Ashok Dhote, Sunita Gawande, and Sandhya Gotmare also are seen. (Pic by Satish Raut)

title: SpaceX said to cut IPO value goal to at least $1.8 trillion
description: SpaceX is currently targeting a valuation of at least $1.8 trillion in its initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as Elon Musk's rocket and artificial intelligence company nears its debut.

title: Carney, Pope Leo discuss responsible AI after pontiff warns world to slow development
description: Prime Minister Mark Carney spoke with Pope Leo about artificial intelligence and the "imperative that AI must serve humanity" — a conversation that comes days after the Pope urged governments to slow down the development of AI systems.

title: Gov. Jared Polis signs law limiting chatbots' interactions with kids
description: Colorado Gov. Jared Polis signed a bill into law Friday that will restrict artificial intelligence-powered chatbots in their interactions with children over concerns about youth suicides and grooming.
content:
A new law signed Friday by Gov. Jared Polis will restrict artificial intelligence-powered chatbots, regulating the technology amid concern about its role in several suicides by young people.
The measure, which passed as House Bill 1263, focuses on sa... [1916 chars]

title: Carney discussed artificial intelligence with Pope Leo
description: OTTAWA — Prime Minister Mark Carney told Pope Leo XIV Canada wants to lead internationally on responsible AI. The Prime Minister's Office says Carney talked to the pontiff today about artificial intelligence.
